scripts.build: pnpm --filter @yomika/shared build && pnpm --filter @yomika/api build && pnpm --filter @yomika/client-app build
scripts.ocr:setup: python -m venv .venv_paddleocr_vl && ./.venv_paddleocr_vl/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && ./.venv_paddleocr_vl/bin/python -m pip install paddlepaddle==3.2.1 -i https://www.paddlepaddle.org.cn/packages/stable/cpu/ && ./.venv_paddleocr_vl/bin/python -m pip install -r infra/paddleocr-vl/requirements.txt
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @yomika/shared lint && pnpm --filter @yomika/api lint && pnpm --filter @yomika/client-app lint
scripts.check: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @yomika/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @yomika/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @yomika/client-app typecheck
